Sp1: absolute/relative gauge-compatible conditions paired with allowed gauge transformations
U1: same constrained subgroup boundary condition; no magnetic sector
claim_boundary: This is an exact equatorial geometry and conditional boundary/localization reduction. It does not identify observed spacetime, physical gauge groups or charges, a physical fermion equation, magnetic monopoles, measured couplings, an absolute unit, or full BHSM.
green_form: vanishes for matched real Dirichlet, Neumann, or Robin domains
interface: continuity plus action-derived jump of weighted normal derivative
metric: Dirichlet induced metric with GHY, or a separately derived mixed boundary action

scalar.Robin: u'+a r u=0 with real r

spinorial_future: self-adjoint Clifford boundary projectors remain action/domain candidates
